content: The app freezes exactly when the market opens, very frustrating experience overall.
Support takes days to reply and does not solve the issue at all sadly.
Great trading experience but needs more advanced portfolio analytics tools please.
Love it! Amazing app with fast UPI payments and smooth mutual fund investing journey.
यह ऐप बहुत खराब है और कभी कभी क्रैश हो जाता है बार बार
Nice app 😀 but crashes sometimes during peak market hours for many users here
The app freezes exactly when the market opens, very frustrating experience overall.
